title: Resilient VLCCs
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-06-08_resilient-vlccs_img_singapore_95f6d024c7f6.jpg
The global VLCC market appears to have entered a phase of cautious stabilisation with freight rates retracing from their war-driven peak back toward pre-war benchmarks. The severe freefall many anticipated from structural tonnage oversupply has so far been avoided. Negotiations between the US and Iran on a 60-day memorandum of understanding (MOU) to extend the ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz are ongoing, but final diplomatic signatures are still pending as key sticking points remain unresolved.
